notes: The game starts now, but crashes as soon as you try and fly a mission.
title: IL-2 Sturmovik: Battle of Stalingrad

notes:
At first, menus worked fine, but launching a mission always resulted in a crash. 
Reinstalling visual c++ 2015 redistributable after trying to run the game helped, easiest way is by entering the following in your terminal: "WINEPREFIX=$PATH-TO-YOUR-STEAM-INSTALLATION/steamapps/compatdata/307960/pfx/ winetricks vcrun2015" (without the quotes) . Of course, you have to substitute $PATH-TO-YOUR-STEAM-INSTALLATION for what it says. Also I wasn't sure from the folder structure whether .../307960/pfx/ or just ...307960/ was the actual prefix folder, so I ran it on both, too lazy to check it in the run script.

The game now runs fine, including actual gameplay. Menus become unresponsive after alt-tabbing, but pressing alt once back in the game fixes this.
title: IL-2 Sturmovik: Battle of Stalingrad
